best_efficiency.label: Best req/s / measured stack avg core

interpretation: Combined HTTP handling plus Kafka client enqueue/fire-and-forget behavior. Faster than confirm, but not equivalent to durable end-to-end delivery.
Rankings are environment-specific and should not be treated as universal backend rankings.
Matched delta data is available below, so you can see how much throughput changed relative to the paired mode.

best_efficiency.label: Best req/s / measured stack avg core

interpretation: Isolates parsing, validation, filtering, and response handling without Kafka in the path.
Rankings are environment-specific and should not be treated as universal backend rankings.

best_efficiency.label: Best req/s / measured stack avg core

interpretation: Combined HTTP handling plus Kafka delivery confirmation. Useful for conservative ingress-path behavior, not pure framework speed.
Rankings are environment-specific and should not be treated as universal backend rankings.
No matched HTTP-only comparison is available for this snapshot, so raw rank is easier to misread.
